title: magnolia citrata
intro: Magnolia citrata, also known as the citrata magnolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, due to the presence of magnolol and honokiol, two lignans with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming the plant or its extracts has been linked to several health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced immune function. Magnolia citrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and modern supplements.
